case_title: JULIE HERSK et al VS. NADER HEYDAYIAN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT HEYDAYIAN, NADER
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT HERSK, JULIE HENDRICKSON, DOUG RECOVER FROM APPELLANT HEYDAYIAN, NADER $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $111.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,761.00, EXHIBITS ARE ORDERED RETURNED. CASE IS REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT PER 116.780(D). SEE SCANNED DOC. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO APPELLANT HEYDAYIAN, NADER
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF HERSK, JULIE HENDRICKSON, DOUG
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BRAD KAPLAN FILED BY HERSK, JULIE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERSK, JULIE HENDRICKSON, DOUG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEYDAYIAN, NADER $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $111.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,611.00, $3625.00 OF THE AWARD IS FOR THE RETURN OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT. THE REMAINING $3875 IS A PENALTY AS PROVIDED IN CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5(L) FOR DEFENDANT'S BAD FAITH RETENTION OF A SECURITY DEPOSIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

Off Calendar Jan-06-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Norman J. Laboe, Esq. for plaintiffs/respondents, Julie Hersk & Doug Hendrickson, who are also present.
Nader Heydayian,defendant/appellant, appears in pro per with witness Abdi Kia

Parties present their respective cases by testimony and documentary evidence under oath.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Evidence is retained.

Judge Curtis E.A. Karnow, Clerk C. Banayad, not reported (608)
